import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./index.css';import{Header}from'./components/layout/Header';import{Sidebar}from'./components/layout/Sidebar';import{Dashboard}from'./components/dashboard/Dashboard';import{TaskTable}from'./components/tasks/TaskTable';import{TaskDetail}from'./components/tasks/TaskDetail';import{Analytics}from'./components/analytics/Analytics';import{Settings}from'./components/settings/Settings';import{useAppStore}from'./store/appStore';import{mockTasks,mockMetrics,mockUsers}from'./data/mockData';import{Toaster}from'react-hot-toast';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[currentView,setCurrentView]=useState('dashboard');const[selectedTask,setSelectedTask]=useState(null);const[sidebarOpen,setSidebarOpen]=useState(true);const{setTasks,setMetrics,setUser,setLoading,tasks,metrics,user}=useAppStore();// Initialize app data
useEffect(()=>{const initializeApp=async()=>{setLoading(true);// Simulate API calls
await new Promise(resolve=>setTimeout(resolve,1000));setTasks(mockTasks);setMetrics(mockMetrics);setUser(mockUsers[0]);// Set current user as John Smith
setLoading(false);};initializeApp();},[setTasks,setMetrics,setUser,setLoading]);const handleTaskSelect=task=>{setSelectedTask(task);};const handleTaskUpdate=updatedTask=>{// In a real app, this would make an API call
const updatedTasks=tasks.map(task=>task.id===updatedTask.id?updatedTask:task);setTasks(updatedTasks);setSelectedTask(updatedTask);};const renderMainContent=()=>{switch(currentView){case'dashboard':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{metrics:metrics,recentTasks:tasks.slice(0,5),onTaskSelect:handleTaskSelect});case'tasks':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskTable,{tasks:tasks,onTaskSelect:handleTaskSelect,onTaskUpdate:handleTaskUpdate});case'analytics':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Analytics,{metrics:metrics,tasks:tasks});case'settings':return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Settings,{user:user});default:return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{metrics:metrics,recentTasks:tasks.slice(0,5)});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"min-h-screen bg-enterprise-gray-50 flex",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Toaster,{position:"top-right",toastOptions:{duration:4000,style:{background:'white',color:'#374151',border:'1px solid #e5e7eb',borderRadius:'8px'}}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Sidebar,{open:sidebarOpen,currentView:currentView,onViewChange:setCurrentView,onToggle:()=>setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`flex-1 flex flex-col transition-all duration-300 ${sidebarOpen?'ml-64':'ml-16'}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Header,{user:user,onSidebarToggle:()=>setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen),sidebarOpen:sidebarOpen}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"flex-1 overflow-hidden",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"h-full flex",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`flex-1 overflow-auto ${selectedTask?'mr-96':''}`,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"p-6",children:renderMainContent()})}),selectedTask&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"w-96 border-l border-enterprise-gray-200 bg-white overflow-auto",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TaskDetail,{task:selectedTask,onUpdate:handleTaskUpdate,onClose:()=>setSelectedTask(null)})})]})})]})]});}export default App;
